if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND i.issue_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.issue_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND i.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND i.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmGiftIssue :: selectById */ i.* , gif.gift_nm AS gift_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_gis.code_label AS gift_issue_status_cd_nm FROM pm_gift_issue i LEFT JOIN pm_gift gif ON gif.gift_id = i.gift_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = i.member_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = i.order_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_gis ON cd_gis.code_grp = 'GIFT_ISSUE_STATUS' AND cd_gis.code_value = i.gift_issue_status_cd WHERE i.gift_issue_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmGiftIssue :: selectList */ i.* , gif.gift_nm AS gift_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_gis.code_label AS gift_issue_status_cd_nm FROM pm_gift_issue i LEFT JOIN pm_gift gif ON gif.gift_id = i.gift_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = i.member_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = i.order_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_gis ON cd_gis.code_grp = 'GIFT_ISSUE_STATUS' AND cd_gis.code_value = i.gift_issue_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmGiftIssue :: selectPageList */ i.* , gif.gift_nm AS gift_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_gis.code_label AS gift_issue_status_cd_nm FROM pm_gift_issue i LEFT JOIN pm_gift gif ON gif.gift_id = i.gift_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = i.member_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = i.order_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_gis ON cd_gis.code_grp = 'GIFT_ISSUE_STATUS' AND cd_gis.code_value = i.gift_issue_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(i.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmGiftIssue :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_gift_issue i
